title: EX14 1SQ, Future Industrial Services Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/YP3835DZ/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Future Industrial Services Limited Installation name: South West Waste Recovery Facility Permit number: EPR/YP3835DZ  "
